name: Cherry Delight
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cans Cherry Pie Filling or 1 Large Topping:
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar until light.
2. Beat in eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in vanilla.
4. Add flour and baking powder; beat until smooth and fluffy.
5. Spread dough evenly on a lightly greased 11x17 inch utility or cake pan (an 8-inch cake pan can also be used).
6. Top with cherry pie filling.
7. Sprinkle the topping mixture over the filling.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 25 minutes, or until edges are light brown.
9. This recipe is also excellent with blueberry pie filling or black raspberry.
10. For a variation, use fresh cherries (drained and dried), pressing them about an inch apart in the dough.
